title: neomarica occidentalis
intro: Neomarica occidentalis, also known as the Atlantic lilyturf or West Indian lilyturf, is a type of flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and relieve respiratory issues. The health benefits of Neomarica occidentalis include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting overall well-being. The plant is typically harvested and prepared for herbal use by boiling or infusing the leaves and roots to make teas, infusions, or decoctions.
